$comment: Reference case for exponential_fog (f = 1 - exp(-density * distance)). Single coefficient (density), single input variable. Shape: saturating curve from 0 → 1. Complement to beer_lambert (same exp-family formula, different orientation).
notes: density=0.01 matches the engine default; at distance=500 the fog factor reaches ~0.993 which gives LM a full range of data to fit against. Relative-tolerance 2 % is tight enough to catch any drift in the exp() approximation path.
